name: x-autopost-library
description: X-AutoPost is a Google Apps Script library that enables users to automate posting content to various platforms, such as social media or blogs, on a scheduled basis. It provides an easy-to-use interface for managing and scheduling posts, making it ideal for individuals and businesses looking to maintain a consistent online presence without manual effort.
author: kztmk

scripts.deploy: npm run bundle && npm run modify && npm run push
scripts.release: npm run bundle && npm run modify
scripts.push: npm run copy-dist && clasp push && npm run cleanup-dist-copy
